Name: EPEX SPOT
Description:
The European Power Exchange EPEX SPOT operates physical electricity markets for the largest trading community in Europe, with over 450 companies connected to our platforms. Committed to innovation, we deliver a full range of services across the value chain of electricity trading, with the highest standards of performance. Our gateway of market solutions include Day-Ahead, Intraday and After-market power trading, Capacity and Guarantees of Origin (GOs) auctions, Local Flexibility and Data services. 

Building on its unique expertise as a co-creator of the Internal Energy Market for electricity, EPEX SPOT’s services span over 22 countries: From power trading across Central Western Europe, the United Kingdom, Switzerland, the Nordics, Baltics and Poland to Market Operation services in Ireland, Hungary, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Serbia and Slovenia. In the environmental market, EPEX SPOT’s Pan-European GOs auctions cover a scope of 22 countries.

As part of EEX Group, a group of companies serving international commodity markets, EPEX SPOT enables a price-responsive power system, to achieve a competitive and climate neutral Europe. 49% of its equity is held by a holding of major European Transmission System Operators. 

For more information, please visit www.epexspot.com.

Name: Gulf Mercantile Exchange (GME)
Description:
Gulf Mercantile Exchange (GME) is a leading energy and commodities exchange in the Middle East. Headquartered in Dubai and regulated by the Dubai Financial Service Authority is the home of the largest physically delivered Crude Oil futures contract in the world. 

Previously known as Dubai Mercantile Exchange (DME), a leading energy-focused commodities exchange, rebranded to GME, after an investment from the Saudi Tadawul Group in 2024, to push its focus on creating cross asset Commodity markets for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the rest of the GCC.  

GME has equal investment from CME Group with the flagship GME Oman Crude Oil Contract listed on CME Globex and cleared at CME Clearing House.

The exchange was founded to create futures pricing for Middle East National Oil Company with Oman (Shareholder) and Dubai utilizing the GME Oman daily marker price for all its crude exports to Asia along with Saudi Arabia, Kuwait and Bahrain utilizing the prices as part of their export pricing methodology.

Name: Entomo AgroIndustrial
Description:
El modelo se basa en la aplicación industrial de Hermetia illucens (mosca soldado negra) como conversor de materia orgánica. Esta especie ha sido seleccionada por su alta capacidad de conversión, por ser un conversor eficiente de gran variedad de residuos de diferente índole, por permitir su producción industrial a densidades muy elevadas, y por no considerarse una plaga o un insecto que pueda tener un impacto negativo en el medio ambiente.

Dada la gran variedad de materias primas que se pueden utilizar como sustrato de crecimiento de la mosca soldado negra y teniendo en cuenta las particularidades legislativas, hemos establecido dos áreas: valorización y reducción.

The model is based on the industrial application of Hermetia illucens (black soldier fly) as a converter of organic matter. This species has been selected for its high conversion capacity, for being an efficient converter of a great variety of waste of different nature, for allowing its industrial production at very high densities, and for not being considered a pest or an insect that could have an impact negative in the environment.

There is a great variety of raw materials that can be used as growth substrate for the black soldier fly, taking into account the legislative particularities, we have established two areas: valorization and reduction.

Name: 優式資本 UC Capital
Description:
優式資本創立於 2021 年，我們的運作模式類似於券商自營部門，僅使用自有資金進行操作，不對外募資，獨立開發特有的交易策略，每年交易量相當於一個中型券商所有客人交易量總和，或相當於前三大券商自營部的交易量。
我們的操作採取絕對報酬策略，不追求短期高回報，而是建立長期穩定績效，保持對風險的謹慎管理，專注於實現正報酬，無論市場處於多頭還是空頭，均能透過多空策略組合獲得穩定績效。我們期待能以台灣出發，打造出世界級的投資公司。

[防詐騙聲明]
優式資本一律以自有資金進行交易，從未對外募資或招攬投資。近期有不明人士假借本公司名義進行投資邀約或聲稱代操股票，皆與本公司無關。

我們提醒社會大眾提高警覺，勿輕信來路不明的訊息或連結，亦勿提供個資或匯款。如有疑慮，請撥打本公司電話或 165 反詐騙專線查證。
對於任何冒用行為，本公司將依法追究法律責任，特此聲明。

Founded in 2021, UC Capital operates like a proprietary trading desk—using only our own capital, without raising external funds. We independently develop trading strategies, and our annual trading volume rivals that of a mid-sized brokerage’s entire retail base or the top three proprietary desks in Taiwan.

We follow an absolute return approach, aiming for steady long-term performance through disciplined risk management. Whether markets rise or fall, our long-short strategies help us deliver consistent results. From Taiwan, we’re building a world-class investment firm.

UC Capital strictly conducts trading using proprietary capital and has never solicited external funds or investment from the public. Recent incidents involving individuals impersonating our firm to promote investment opportunities or claim discretionary trading services are entirely unrelated to UC Capital.

We urge the public to remain vigilant. Do not trust unsolicited messages or suspicious links, and never disclose personal information or transfer funds. If in doubt, please contact our company directly or call the Anti-Fraud Hotline at 165 for verification.

UC Capital reserves the right to pursue legal action against any unauthorized use of our name or identity. This is an official statement.

Name: Elite Lead Exchange

يضع تطبيق قوائم بين يديك بيانات وتحليلات متقدّمة كانت متاحة للشركات والصناديق الاستثمارية فقط ويبسّطها لجميع المستثمرين.

يمكنك متابعة الشركات التي تهتم بها من خلال إضافتها إلى قائمة المفضلة لتصبح مطّلعا بشكل مستمر على ما يستجد لتلك الشركات.

ابق مطلعا على كل أحداث الشركات الجديدة، كتوزيعات الأرباح النقدية، أو تداولات كبار الملاك وأعضاء مجلس الإدارة، أو تغييرات رأس المال وغيرها.

يمكنك أيضا استلام تنبيهات عن أحدث التطورات كتحديث تقييم بيوت الخبرة والمحللين لشركاتك. مما يساعد في الوصول إلى فرص الاستثمار المحتملة بشكل مبكّر جداً.

تمكّنك الادوات المتاحة على تطبيق قوائم من إجراء تحليل عميق للشركة لتكون أقرب إلى إجراء استثمار ناجح.

تعرف على أداء الشركة في الماضي، والأداء المستقبلي المتوقع، ومدى استمرارية التوزيعات النقدية الحالية للشركة.

راقب الآراء الشرعية لشركاتك بحسب أهم اللجان الشرعية في المملكة.


باختصار! هدفنا تكون أنجح مستثمر في سوق الأسهم.

Name: SpiritsNext
Description:
SpiritsNext is revolutionizing the €417 billion spirits market by creating the world's first commodity exchange for fine spirits. We're transforming an illiquid, fragmented market into a transparent, efficient trading platform accessible to producers, professionals, and investors worldwide.
Our Mission
To unlock liquidity in the spirits casks market through standardized evaluation, transparent pricing, and regulated trading infrastructure.
What We Do

4C Dynamic Evaluation System: Proprietary methodology providing objective, standardized valuation across all spirits categories
Regulated Trading Platform infrastructure enabling futures, primeurs, and spot trading with institutional-grade security
IoT Monitoring Network: Real-time tracking of storage conditions, aging progress, and quality parameters
AI Portfolio Management: Advanced analytics for market insights and trading efficiency
Primary & Secondary Markets: Comprehensive architecture connecting liquidity, pricing, and cash flow

Market Impact
The €50B annual spirits casks market represents only 4% of total inventory. SpiritsNext is unlocking this value through:

60% reduction in pricing volatility through standardization
Transaction costs reduced from 4-5% to 1-2%
T+1 settlement through digital infrastructure
24/7 global trading access

Why Now
Perfect market timing with converging favorable factors:
✓ Fine spirits outperforming traditional investments (15% CAGR 2010-2020)
✓ Real World Asset tokenization gaining traction ($16B+ in 2024, growing 300% YoY)
✓ Swiss DLT Act (2021) providing regulatory clarity
✓ IoT maturity enabling cost-effective monitoring (€30-50/unit)
Our Approach
Starting with premium Armagnac and Cognac expanding to whisky, rum, and global markets when full regulatory approval.

Robox.Fi is the first escrow-less NFT leveraged trading platform on Solana. The platform consolidates NFT listings from various marketplaces, providing easy browsing and enabling traders to trade NFTs at a fraction of their price.

Robox.Fi seeks to revolutionize the NFT market by creating a user-friendly and secure trading platform that provides equal opportunities to investors and traders to access high-value NFTs.

The platform is designed to democratize the NFT market by:

Making it more accessible and liquid, allowing for easier buying and selling of NFTs.

Allowing users to trade NFTs with leverage while taking into account their unique needs and risk tolerance, addressing the low liquidity and risk aversion challenges faced by NFT traders.

Ultimately, Robox.Fi aims to become the go-to platform for NFT trading, offering advanced leverages and trading mechanics while maintaining a focus on simplicity and usability.

Name: TENEX NFT Exchange
Description:
TENEX is the first non-auction, transactional Web3 exchange of its kind for buying and selling non-fungible tokens (“NFTs”) and any other digital asset.  The TENEX platform focuses on offering tokens with an underlying intrinsic, comparative value, making it different than all other NFT exchanges, which primarily focus on digital art, virtual worlds, collectibles and video games.  TENEX is built for institutions and professional traders, designed to meet regulatory standards that current NFT exchanges don't have.

What is unique about TENEX?

>> Access multiple digital asset types across multiple exchanges in real-time.
>> Allow high frequency traders to co-locate servers with exchange trade matching technology, providing lowest possible latency.
>> Utilize spreading function between separate asset classes.
>> Take advantage of multiple blockchains by bridging interactions between chains. 
>> Mint NFTs on major blockchains, move them between networks, and list for trading on secondary market.

Follow this page to receive updates on our coming commercial launch.

Name: PROFESSIONAL AG MARKETING, INC
Description:
Professional Ag Marketing was created in 2006 to help advise grain and livestock producers on alternative risk management strategies for their operation.  With markets being so volatile in this day and age, it is vital to your business to control that risk.  Pro Ag’s objective is to help your operation prevent downside that may cause unnecessary risk and also help avoid and react to market fluctuation.

Our goal is to understand our customer’s cost of production and develop a comprehensive risk management strategy for livestock and crop producers, owners and investors.  Our row crop operations also includes a strategy that revolves around the best fit crop insurance plan for your business. Pro Ag strives to bring the most updated and relevant information to our customers that will help them make their day to day decisions.

During the ethanol expansion era, corn prices grew to record prices. Post-ethanol expansion has brought difficulties to many livestock producers.  Mandates, weather, and similar uncontrollable events like this happen all the time. These are the types of risks we face in agriculture world which could make or break an operation.  Risk management is an incredibly important resource that could possibly save a family farm or business, or even a long-standing developed operation.

Name: GANT Incorporation
Description:
Global Agritrade Networks Technology Inc. (GANT)

At GANT, we are redefining agritrade through a sophisticated, technology-driven ecosystem that fosters seamless connections between farmers, co-operatives, and institutional buyers across the globe. Our platform serves as a cornerstone for transparent, equitable, and sustainable agricultural trade, leveraging cutting-edge tools to bridge traditional gaps. 

Utilizing blockchain technology, we ensure every transaction is immutable and verifiable, providing an unparalleled layer of trust from farm to market. Our federated data model enhances privacy and sovereignty, allowing localized data management while enabling global insights, ensuring compliance with international standards.

Central to our operations is the Market Matching Engine, which facilitates real-time bid/ask trading of commodities, supported by IoT-enabled Collection Centers that verify quality, origin, and ESG metadata. The Corridor Risk Engine, powered by advanced AI, assesses geopolitical, logistical, and climate risks, dynamically optimizing trade routes and triggering risk mitigation strategies. Smart contracts automate settlements with T+1 precision, reducing delays and enhancing financial efficiency. Together, these innovations create a resilient network, starting with North America-Europe corridors, where data-driven decisions and technological precision drive a new era of agritrade excellence.
GANT is committed to advancing this interconnected ecosystem, inviting collaboration with stakeholders who share our vision for a transparent and sustainable future in agriculture.


 Contact us: david@gantexchange.com

Name: European Commodities Exchange
Description:
Inaugurated in 1961 on the initiative of the professional Exchanges of Mannheim (D) and Strasbourg (F), the European Commodities Exchange, whose headquarters are at the Strasbourg Commodities Exchange, has grown over the years to take in 37 Exchanges from 12 different countries. Its reputation and influence broadly exceed the context of commercial business in the strictest sense. The Exchanges are not stock exchanges in the customary sense of this expression but cereals markets which group operators from the seed, fertiliser, animal feed and related product sectors, as well as the tertiary sector (banks, transport, insurance, etc.).

Its primary mission is to organise "Exchange Days". Each year, in one of Europe’s major cities, the European Commodities Exchange asserts the representative activities of the members of the Exchanges through the increasing success of its meetings. In practice, they offer the opportunity for the players in the cereal sector to meet each other face to face, discuss the market’s future, establish contacts and consolidate their relationship of reciprocal trust.

Quem somos
A BBGN é o resultado da iniciativa e visão dos fundadores, com larga experiência na indústria de gás natural, objetivando ser a infraestrutura transacional digital em um ambiente sólido, transparente e confiável para negócios com gás natural e biometano, conforme previsto na Lei do Gás.
Nossa principal missão é contribuir com o desenvolvimento de um mercado mais livre, integrado, moderno e competitivo, conectando Agentes na compra e venda de gás natural e biometano, com foco na transparência, liquidez, segurança e eficiência, gerando um efeito rede, facilitando transações e dando maior liquidez ao mercado, fomentando negócios, fortalecendo relações, otimizando a supervisão governamental e contribuindo fortemente para a modernização dessa indústria.
Trata-se de um passo estratégico no processo de amadurecimento do mercado, ampliando as oportunidades de liquidez, atraindo novos agentes, fomentando a concorrência, fortalecendo assim a indústria do gás natural e biometano.
Futuramente planejamos ampliar a atuação na cadeia de valor com soluções que abrangem instrumentos de mitigação de risco (mercado futuro e contratos derivativos) e financeiros.

Joint-stock company Market Operator is an analogue of the European Energy Exchange and is responsible for electricity trades organizing on the day-ahead market and the intraday market in Ukraine.

We work transparently, 24/7 in a compliance with principles of free pricing and make 100% payments daily between those who sold and those who bought electricity that prevents the emergence of debts on these segments of the new energy market.

We are the first and the only company among energy companies who has implemented and make payments through ESCROW accounts. And we are the first who has a payment system that works on weekends.

All business processes of the Market Operator are automated, that makes it impossible to misuse during the electricity purchase and sale, and provides equal conditions for all companies participating in the bidding. 

The Market Operator has built mutual partnerships with sellers and buyers of electricity, which are expressed in the willingness to help 24/7, a timely and full payment and an issuance of all documents, a registration of its tax liabilities.

We work on the Anti-Corruption Program and the Anti-Corruption Policy basis. Clear adherence to ethical behavior by all employees of the company contributes to quality functionality, enhances reputation and avoids potential risks of bribery, participation in corruption, which can lead to undermining the reputation and losing of the confidence in the Market Operator. In 2021, we received an international certificate of compliance of the anti-corruption management system with the requirements of ISO 37001.

Name: TokeApps
Description:
Toke is a ‘Community Trading by Exchange’ application offering a cashless/moneyless exchange of commodities and services.

The idea evolved from the 17th Century trading concept – Commodity – Capital – Commodity, means trade through a fiduciary agent as an intermediary, whether fiat or cryptocurrency. In the 19th Century, Karl Marx produced his magnum opus work, ‘Capital’ (Das Kapital), which focused on the ‘use-value’ of a commodity, shedding the capital component.

We’ve reinvented the notion – ‘use value’ of commodities and services and put the cashless concept together to create this mobile trading/exchange/barter platform- ToKE app. The app supports commodity community-based trading also known as barter.

The term Toke is derived from ‘Token of Keynesian Exchange’. A term coined in 1999 when developing a concept of digital currency, originally intended to replace fiat.

Join Us:

Follow our LinkedIn page for updates on our journey, insights into the startup ecosystem, and opportunities to engage with pioneering companies.

Giving regulatory accommodation to inputs with added value, which fit into current regulations at the European level, and of course integrating them precisely through formulations based on natural ingredients and plant extracts, has positioned us at a level of high recognition and prestige in the market.
With a good introduction in associations and groups of reference and influence in the agricultural sector, we have recently become a member of EBIC, an association par excellence that represents pioneering companies with more knowledge and presence in the Biostimulant market.

Apart from the Agricultural business, ALFARIN has a division of Pharma (APIS, benzodiazepines). All the compliance of our Pharma Business has been extended to every corner and process that makes up our value chain. 
ISO 9001, GDP, RUESA, REACH compliance.

Our mission, vision and values are directly and transversally focused on acting with precision and professionalism, throughout relationships with partners aligned with our products and work. Result, the added value for the ecosystem we are part of.

MQSA began by dedicating itself exclusively to the 𝗳𝗼𝗼𝗱 𝘀𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿, but over the years, we have grown and specialized in other sectors – 𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗼𝗻𝘂𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀, 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗽𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗴𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀. We have a wide catalog of products and we have the possibility of continuing to incorporate products according to the needs that may arise for our customers.

MQSA's clients fully benefit from its values of personal involvement, dedication, mutual respect and trustworthiness.

Having been in the sector for more than 75 years, we have many years of 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗮𝘀 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀 and therefore we can guarantee that we always work with the best sources to offer a 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗲, 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗯𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗯𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲.

Our 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗲𝗱 𝗹𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, near the port of Barcelona, together with facilities of more than 500m2, is a great advantage for us when 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗿𝗮𝘄 𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹𝘀, as it helps us to guarantee a 𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵 𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹 𝗼𝗳 𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗰𝗸 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗽𝘁 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲.

Quality is a strategic point for Materias Químicas, which is why we have strict control over all our raw materials, as well as our suppliers.

MQSA is certified with 𝗜𝗦𝗢 𝟵𝟬𝟬𝟭 and also with the 𝗨𝗡𝗘 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗿𝗱 for organic products.

Name: Asociación Nacional de Importadores de Materias Primas (AIMPR)
Description:
La AIMPR nace en Castellón en el año 2009 y reúne a las principales empresas importadoras de materias primas para uso cerámico a nivel nacional
Este colectivo empresarial abastece el sector de las materias primas y productos químicos necesarios para la fabricación de materiales cerámicos en nuestro país. 
Esta asociación (AIMPR) se creó con el propósito de velar por los objetivos comunes de sus asociados, siendo algunos de los objetivos la compresión y gestión de las nuevas adaptaciones de las normativas REACH, CLP, SEVESO, etc. que apliquen a todos y cada uno de los productos que importamos, la participación activa en los distintos consorcios creados al efecto, crear vínculos y sinergias con otras asociaciones del sector, así como reforzar nuestra posición con las distintas instituciones públicas y privadas.

The AIMPR was born in 2009 in Castellón and gathers the key importing companies of raw materials for ceramic use at a national level.
This business collective supplies the industry with the raw materials and chemical products necessary to produce ceramic materials in our country.
 
This association (AIMPR) was created with the aim of ensuring the common objectives of its associates, some of the objectives being the understanding and management of the new policies of the REACH, CLP, SEVESO, etc. to be applied to each and every one of the products we import, active participation in the different consortiums created to this effect, creating links and synergies with other associations in the sector, as well as strengthen our position before different public and private institutions.

Name: DINAGAS SA
Description:
DINAGAS, S.A. es una empresa de ámbito nacional dedicada a la distribución de material frigorífico, que nace en Almería en el año 1987 de manos de D. Juan Jose Plata, empresario y maestro industrial con una gran trayectoria en la industria del frÍo. Al poco tiempo de iniciar la actividad, decide trasladar la sede central a Sevilla, desde donde comienza la expansión de la empresa, proyectándola al resto del territorio nacional, así para continuar con la apertura en 2001 en Madrid.

En una primera etapa, DINAGAS, comienza con la distribución de gases refrigerantes para ir paulatinamente ampliando su porfolio de productos específicos del campo de la refrigeración, y climatización tales como aislamiento, tuberías frigoríficas, accesorios, ventilación, así como herramientas y demás repuestos para el frio y climatización en general.

Name: 信村投資 XinCun Investment
Description:
信村投資自2024年起開始服務內部投資人，營運模式類似於券商自營部門，僅使用自有資金進行操作，從未對外募資或招攬投資。我們結合質化研究與量化模型，專注於發掘被市場低估或誤解的潛力企業。

信村擁有專業的研究團隊，透過深入的基本面分析、產業趨勢洞察與前瞻性的策略判斷，精準識別具備長期價值的投資標的。同時，運用量化策略中的因子分析技術，有效強化投資組合建構與風險管理，提升整體投資決策的科學性與一致性。

我們採取絕對報酬導向的投資策略，不追求短期高報酬，而是致力於建立長期穩健的回報架構，嚴控風險，並尊重市場週期。無論處於多頭或空頭市場，我們皆致力於創造穩定績效，並持續邁向成為具備全球視野的世界級投資機構。

【防詐騙聲明】
信村投資一律以自有資金進行交易，從未對外募資或招攬投資。我們提醒社會大眾提高警覺，勿輕信來路不明的訊息或連結，亦勿提供個人資料或匯款。如有疑慮，請撥打165反詐騙專線查證。
對於任何冒用本公司名義之行為，我們將依法追究法律責任，特此聲明。

Since 2024, XinCun Investments has been serving investors under a proprietary capital model, similar to the trading desks of brokerage firms. We exclusively use our own capital for investment activities and have never raised external funds or solicited investments from the public.

We combine qualitative research with quantitative modeling to uncover companies that are undervalued or misunderstood by the broader market. Backed by a dedicated research team, we conduct in-depth fundamental analysis, gain insights from industry trends, and apply forward-looking strategic judgment to identify investment opportunities with long-term value. In parallel, we utilize factor-based quantitative strategies to enhance portfolio construction and risk management, bringing greater scientific rigor and consistency to our decision-making process.

Our investment approach is absolute-return oriented. We do not chase short-term performance, but instead focus on building a stable, long-term return profile with disciplined risk control and deep respect for market cycles. Whether in bull or bear markets, our goal is to deliver consistent results for our capital and grow into a world-class investment firm with a global perspective.

Name: Beyond Equity Global Marketplace (BEGM)
Description:
Beyond Equity Global Marketplace (BEGM)

"All Markets. All Asset Classes, One Gateway"
"From SPV's to S&P's, We Deliver Next-Gen Trading Platform Execution"

About
Beyond Equity Global Marketplace (BEGM) is a next-generation institutional trading and investment platform built to unify access across private equity, public markets, and digital assets—all within one secure, regulatory-first ecosystem.

Powered by Beyond Alpha Ventures and the Beyond Equity Family Office, BEGM bridges the gap between traditional broker-dealer infrastructure and the modern digital marketplace. The platform offers seamless access to pre-IPO opportunities, venture secondaries, AI-driven analytics, and tokenized investment vehicles, all designed for Qualified Purchasers, family offices, and institutional investors.

BEGM functions as a digital operating system for global capital markets, integrating execution, custody, and compliance under a unified ledger. Its architecture is engineered for precision, scalability, and transparency—enabling investors to trade equities, options, crypto derivatives, and tokenized assets through one unified interface.

Our mission is to democratize institutional-grade investing, providing investors with the same data intelligence, compliance infrastructure, and liquidity access once reserved for Wall Street’s elite.

Vision:
To become the world’s first fully integrated marketplace bridging public, private, and digital capital markets on a single, transparent platform.

40 Wall Street, New York, NY 10005

Financial Services | FinTech | Capital Markets | Digital Assets | AI Trading

Name: REALCOLIBRI
Description:
The RealColibri system allows you to automate exchange trading on futures markets. Years of experience and results of professional traders are now available not only for hedge funds, investment banks and large trust management companies. We have transferred our experience into an understandable and accessible product. The trading algorithm works on your accounts and does not require the transfer of funds. We use our own RCBC token on a smart contract in the TRON blockchain to pay the commission. 

RealColibri takes into account a huge number of factors when trading. The system is written and maintained by professionals with more than 15 years of real trading experience. Today, RealColibri performs on average up to 1,000 trades per day with low volume and price movement. This avoids drawdowns and allows safe and profitable trading. 

RealColibri consists of several services:
- Automation system for futures trading on exchanges
- RealColibri Coin (RCBC)
- Staking (RCBC)
- Referral system.

At the moment, we open the possibility to trade on global futures markets (Chicago, Singapore, Tokyo, etc.) through Rithmic datafeed. Our partner is Advantage Futures. There is also an extended integration of global futures exchanges with the help of Trading Technologies datafeed.

RealColibri is a broker for the largest crypto exchanges Binance and ByBit. Millions of users can connect to RealColibri system through API keys and make profit on their accounts. Now OKX and Bitget also approached us. The integration work is in progress.

Name: El Exchanges
Description:
Commodity Derivatives: Commodity Derivatives are products where commodities are contracted to buy or sell at an agreed price for delivery at a specified date. Commodities include energy products, agricultural
products, soft commodities, and metals.

Equity Derivatives: Equity Derivatives are Products whose value is at least partly derived from one or more underlying equity asset class. Equity derivatives also include futures and options based on index products or dividends. Futures and Options are the most traded equity derivatives.

Foreign Exchange Derivatives: A Foreign Exchange Derivatives or currency futures contract is an agreement between two parties to deliver a set amount of currency at a fixed future date, called the expiry. In some cases, the contract is settled by cash payment based on an index price or other known commodity pricing mechanism.

Interest Rate Derivatives: Interest rate derivatives are futures and options whose underlying is an asset related to interest rates, including short-term interest rate index contracts, fixed income contracts, and interest rate swap contracts.

Contamos con nuestro propio Marketplace que integra Créditos de Carbono y Créditos de Plástico, y, a través de dicho mercado, ofrecemos una lista de proyectos de compensación de carbono verificados (CCV) e inspiradores que son adecuados tanto para particulares como para empresas e industrias, de diferentes tamaños, tanto en Chile como en el extranjero. Diseñamos, asesoramos y acompañamos a los proyectos de compensación de carbono, los cuales provienen de distintas actividades o sectores; todos certificados, y verificables debido a su trazabilidad.

De esta forma apoyamos las necesidades de los países que se suscribieron al Acuerdo de París, en la Convención Marco de las Naciones Unidas sobre el Cambio Climático. Acuerdo que en su artículo 6to. subscribe que las partes podrán optar por cooperar voluntariamente en la aplicación de sus contribuciones determinadas a nivel nacional para lograr una mayor ambición en sus medidas de mitigación y adaptación y promover el desarrollo sostenible y la integridad del medio ambiente.

Name: Kasaï Capital Management DRC SARL
Description:
Kasaï Capital Management DRC SARL, (KCM DRC), is a private Mining and Commodity Trading Company. 

Our commodities are sourced from reliable and responsible partners in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), one of the world's richest countries in terms of natural resources, which is why it was dubbed the 'geological scandal' by Belgian geologist, Jules Cornet, in the 19th century.

At KCM, we support the ESG Framework and the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals. Our focus on ethical and sustainable practices ensures that our clients receive the highest quality commodities, while helping the local communities and protecting the environment.

The Kasaï Region of the DRC is world-renowned for its Diamond Resources and still has enormous untapped potential. This, and the fact that one of our co-founders has his roots in Kasaï, gave us the name for our firm. 'Kasaï of the beauties' is how the people of this region of the DRC humorously refer to it in 'Tshiluba' (their native language).

The founders of KCM were young European entrepreneurs, with a high-level network at the heart of Europe and the DRC.
They initially established 'KCM BV' in Belgium in 2023, followed by the creation of 'KCM DRC SARL' in the DRC the next year. However, the partnership later dissolved, leading to the continuation of 'KCM DRC SARL' while 'KCM BV' was subsequently liquidated.

Name: Flash Crypto Finance
Description:
Flash Crypto Finance is a Skydatasol platform designed as a global cryptocurrency and government equities exchange, while also serving as the official exchange for the Lighter Ledger Pound (LLP). Headquartered in London, the startup bridges the gap between digital assets and traditional government-backed securities, providing a secure and compliant trading environment for global users.

The platform delivers:
	•	Dual Asset Exchange: Seamless conversion between cryptocurrencies, government equities, and the Lighter Ledger Pound (LLP), supporting liquidity across digital and regulated markets.
	•	Advanced Trading Infrastructure: Real-time market data, advanced order matching, transparent order books, and institutional-grade execution.
	•	Secure Custody & Storage: Multi-layered security protocols, including multi-factor authentication, cold storage for crypto, and encrypted equity records.
	•	Regulatory & Compliance Framework: End-to-end KYC/AML protocols aligned with international standards, enabling lawful cross-border transactions.
	•	Global Reach: Partnerships across the US, Europe, Asia, and beyond, ensuring access to diverse government equities and financial markets.

Today, Flash Crypto Finance operates not only as an innovative crypto-equities marketplace, but also as the dedicated LLP exchange, supporting the economic ecosystem of the National Security Framework of the Polar Regions. This dual function ensures both sovereign financial resilience and global market integration.

Name: Suomen Kultareservi
Description:
Suomen Kultareservi on kullan ostamiseen erikoistunut alan edelläkävijä. Toimimme täysin läpinäkyvästi ja tarjoamme alan kärkeä edustavat hinnat ilman piilokuluja. Asiakkaamme tietävät aina etukäteen, mitä maksamme – ensimmäisestä grammasta alkaen.

Perustimme yhtiön vuonna 2019 vastalauseena alan epäselvälle hinnoittelulle ja harhaanjohtavalle viestinnälle. Tänään olemme Suomen korkeimmalle arvioitu kullan ostoon erikoistunut yritys, ja olemme palvelleet tuhansia asiakkaita vastuullisesti ja tehokkaasti.

Hinnoittelumme perustuu reaaliaikaiseen maailmanmarkkinahintaan, jonka asiakas voi tarkistaa ennen kaupantekoa. Ostamme kultaa lähes päivittäin ympäri Suomen, ja käsittelemme jokaisen erän tarkasti röntgendiagnostiikalla, jotta asiakas saa juuri sen hinnan, jonka kulta ansaitsee.

Toimimme vastuullisesti: käytämme CO₂-neutraalia sulattoa ja lahjoitamme osan voitoistamme Luonnonperintösäätiölle vanhojen metsien suojeluun. Jokainen gramma kultaa on mahdollisuus tehdä asioita paremmin – ympäristön, asiakkaan ja alan tulevaisuuden kannalta.

Vuonna 2025 ylitämme 15 miljoonan euron liikevaihdon ja tavoitteenamme on kasvaa 25–30 miljoonan tasolle säilyttäen läpinäkyvyys, tehokkuus ja asiakkaiden luottamus.

Etsimme jatkuvasti uusia yhteistyökumppaneita, vastuullisia toimijoita ja digitaalisia mahdollisuuksia, joilla voimme viedä toimialaa eteenpäin.

Suomen Kultareservi – Rikkaampi elämä.
Luottamusta gramma kerrallaan.

Name: 화증권
Description:
2024년 올해로 창립 62주년을 맞는 화증권은 고객에 대한 신뢰, 주주에 대한 투명한 경영과 정도 영업, 화합과 신뢰라는 건실한 조직문화를 바탕으로 내실 있고, 믿을 수 있는 증권사로 성장해 왔습니다.

2022년 KOSPI는 2022년 하반기에 전격적으로 이루어진 금리 인상과 부동산 PF 관련 동성 위기를 이겨내고 2022년 말 대비 상승하며 장을 마감하였습니다.
하지만 증권업계는 그 어느 때보다도 많은 이슈가 발생하며, 고객님들과 시장참여자들로부터 증권업 전반에 대한 신뢰 회복이 가장 중요한 과제로 대두되었습니다.
이러한 환경에도 우리 화증권은 우리의 경영철학인 "고객 자산의 보호와 안정적인 수익 추구"를 위해 전 임직원이 최선을 다해 노력한 결과 우리 고객들에게는 어떠한 불안감과 이슈 없이 2023년을 마무리할 수 있었습니다.

2024년은 그 어느 해보다도 중요하고 도전적이고 긍정적인 기회가 될 것입니다.
그동안 강화된 리스크 관리로 재무적 안정성을 확보해 온 우리 회사는 우리의 강점을 살려 우리가 잘할 수 있는 분야에서 경쟁력을 확보하고자 합니다.
이러한 경쟁력 확보를 위해 2024년 집중하여야 할 전략적 최우선 과제로 "채권투자의 활성화!"를 제시하고 자 합니다.
또한 이와 함께 추진해야 할 핵심과제를 3가지 Keyword로 말씀드리겠습니다.

첫째. 재무적 목표 달성을 위해 "Acievement"

둘째. 성장의 모멘텀을 만들기 위한 "Business Network" 확대

셋째. 최우선 전략과제인 "Compliance" 강화입니다.

2024년은 그 시작부터 많은 난관이 예상됩니다.
2023년 말부터 구체화한 부동산 PF 관련 크레딧 이슈, 손실 상환이 예상되는 ELS 상품 이슈, 랩, 신탁상품 편입 채권 관련 불공정거래 이슈 등 증권업계는 그 어느 때보다도 긴장하며 새해를 맞이하였습니다.

그러나 '작지만 강한 회사' , '고객의 자산을 보호하고 안정적인 수익을 창출하는 회사'. '위기에 강한 회사'라는 새로운 경영전략과 목표를 설정하고 우리의 장점을 살려 2024년에는 반드시 우리 화증권의 성장과 성공의 모멘텀을 만들어 내리라 확신합니다.
